Consolidated Company Daily Report - Blueprint
Date: 2026-05-11

1. HR - Human Resources
- Attendance:
  - Present: Core architecture team, all PMs except 1.
  - Absent: 1 PM on approved sick leave.
  - Late: 1 maintenance team member (reported, valid reason).
  - No-Show: 1 site engineer (no notice given) — NTE to be drafted.
- HR Issues:
  - Reiterated attendance policy to maintenance team.
  - NTE for unreported absence being prepared by HR.

2. Project Management and Site Updates
- Pearl de Flore: Manpower shortage today due to absences. Recovery plan in place.
- Fixifoot: Normal operations. Joinery delivery scheduled tomorrow.
- Icon 18H: Site engineer no-show caused delay in lavatory relocation walkthrough.

3. CEO Action Items
- Approve NTE template wording for unreported absences - Deadline: 2026-05-12

4. Company Priorities for Tomorrow
- Priority 1: Make up for today's lost manpower hours at Pearl de Flore.
- Priority 2: Conduct lavatory relocation walkthrough at Icon 18H.

Date: 2026-05-12

1. HR - Human Resources
- Attendance: Full team present. Yesterday's no-show acknowledged the NTE.
- HR Issues: None new.

2. Project Management and Site Updates
- Pearl de Flore: Caught up on manpower hours. Back to 90% timeline.
- Icon 18H: Walkthrough completed. Decision pending on lavatory relocation.

3. CEO Action Items
- Approve NTE final wording - Deadline: 2026-05-13
